title: Interactive Mass Spectrometer
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: AP Chemistry
description: Animated MicroSim demonstrating mass spectrometer components and isotope mass spectra.

learningObjectives: Analyze a mass spectrum to determine isotopic composition
Evaluate how isotope abundance affects average atomic mass

keyQuestions: Why do lighter isotopes bend more in the magnetic field?
How does relative peak height relate to natural abundance?
commonMisconceptions: All isotopes of an element have the same abundance
Heavier ions should arrive at the detector first
assessmentOpportunities: Ask students to calculate average atomic mass from the displayed bars
